name: Heroes
overview: The drama tells the story of a group of individuals with different backgrounds who were unexpectedly drawn into a mysterious treasure-hunting journey during the late Qing Dynasty. Amidst the grand and tumultuous historical tide, they gradually strengthened their ideals of saving the country.

trailers.title: Heroes Trailer | 2024 - 2025 | Chinese Drama | Staring Liu Yu Ning & Qin Jun Jie & Huang Meng Ying
